name: Nana Futami
description: A woman who writes a serialized manga about shogi (Japanese chess) in a girl's manga magazine. She is a rookie manga artist whose current work is her first serialization, and was Takizawa's assistant until the serialization was decided. She is shy and paranoid, and often receives various criticisms from her assistant Mizuki Hazama. name: Saki Hyuuga
description: Saki is a cheerful athletic girl and a member of Yuunagi Middle School's girls' softball team. She is excellent at sports but not very good at school (but still a bright individual), loves sweets and has a large appetite. Although Saki appears childish at times, she is lenient and gregarious, and her cheerful and easygoing personality often makes people happy and befriended. Her family runs the PANPAKA Pan Bakery. She is very energetic and optimistic girl whose hopeful nature often inspires or e

name: Sakura Chiyono O
description: **Height:** 156cm Follow your dreams! This Umamusume is honest and hardworking. A pure-hearted, honest Umamusume. She admires [Maruzensky](https://anilist.co/character/140842/Maruzensky), and aims to be her equal in every way. She makes a habit out of filling her "Chiyonotes" with proverbs relevant to her daily experiences—though few but her are able to parse them.

name: Seyzelk
description: The leader of the elite adventurer group "Sword of Flame." Despite his intimidating appearance, he possesses a gentle nature. Not only is he a formidable combatant, but he also possesses keen intellect; he leads his members through mutual trust, making him a leader worthy of the title. His skills include Hand-to-Hand Combat (Rank 3), Swordsmanship (Rank 2), and Fortitude (Rank 1). He is kind to [Ivy](https://anilist.co/character/294131/Ivy).

name: Souji Mitsuka
description: Souji is an ordinary high school student, though, he has obsession of twintails. One day, a girl called Thouars approached him as monsters appearing one after another, claiming him to be only man with the most potential of using Tail Gear, and entrusted him one to fight the monster, by transforming into Tail Red.

name: Souta Takanashi
description: **Height**: 172 cm Souta is a high school student recruited by Popura to become a new employee at the family restaurant Wagnaria. He is enamored by cute things and thus favors Poplar over the other employees due to her cute appearance. He voices his thoughts out loud and occasionally offends his co-workers, often resulting in him getting punished by them. He usually finds his co-workers and the rules of the restaurant to be strange, but he still has an attachment to his job. He can adapt quickly

name: Sumire Yamanashi
description: Sumire Yamanashi is a female character of Sunohara-Sō no Kanrinin-san. She is a resident of Sunohara Inn and a student council member of her school with Yuzu Yukimoto and Yuri Kazami. She appears to be a calm and quiet person.

name: Takumi Kuruya
description: Takumi Kuruya is an informant based in Tokyo's Shinjuku Ward who uses illegal drones to collect data alongside other methods; occasionally, he also helps contract killers conceal their victims' corpses. Per Lisa Kuraki's instructions, he has become companion to the Corpse God and assists his fortunetelling business by collection information on clients during their sessions.

description: A self-proclaimed football genius.
